mapper.sql:
FROM TWORK_MST_EQ EQ INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = EQ.CTKEY
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select:
/* wms-master-eqmgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectEqMgmtList */
SELECT '0' AS CHK , EQ.CTKEY , CT.CTNM , EQ.EQNM , EQ.EQDIVCD , EQ.EQBARCODE , EQ.MODELNO , EQ.MODELSERIALNO , EQ.PRDCTCPNM , EQ.PRDCTCPTELNO , EQ.SALECPNM , EQ.SALECPTELNO , EQ.INSDAY , EQ.OPERSTARTDAY , EQ.PICH , EQ.SUBPICH , EQ.IPADDR , EQ.INSERTDATE , EQ.INSERTURKEY , EQ.UPDATEDATE , EQ.UPDATEURKEY
